instruction: Aplicar principios of design of software of John Ousterhout. Use for reduzir complexidade, criar modulos profundos, escrever codigo obvio e tomar decisoes of design defensaveis. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Source A Philosophy of Software Design — John Ousterhout  ## Objective

workflow.action: Identificar sintomas of complexidade (change amplification, cognitive load, unknown unknowns).
Classificar modulos como profundos ou rasos e eliminar pass-through desnecessario.
Verificar information hiding — o que e exposto not deveria ser?
Auditar consistency of convencoes in todo o codebase.
Refatorar for modulos mais profundos with interfaces mais simples.

outputContract: Lista of modulos rasos for aprofundar.
Plano of information hiding by servico.
